title: EventBatch
description: A batch of road events submitted by the Asphalt SDK to the ingestion API. Batching reduces battery and network overhead.

batch_id.description: Client-generated UUID for the batch. Used for idempotent resubmission if the first upload fails.

submitted_at_ms.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the batch was assembled for upload.

events.description: List of road events. Maximum 500 per batch to bound payload size.
